chapter_title: Compensation for personal injury or property damage
snippet: Volunteer school workers are covered by the Department’s worker's compensation policy if they suffer personal injury in the course of engaging in school work. If a volunteer school worker suffers damage to their property in the course of carrying out school work, the Minister may authorise such compensation as the Minister thinks reasonable in the circumstances. Claims of this nature are to be directed to: Legal Division People and Executive Services Group Department of Education and Training 2 Treasury Place East Melbourne VIC 3002 legal.services@education.vic.gov.au
